issues.description: Known program cost and unknown weekly capacity support affordability and completion analysis, but they do not establish borrowing or debt exposure.
issues.remediation_requirement: Replace debt exposure with affordability pressure, or add an explicit financing or borrowing fact.

issues.description: Spanish and Russian add different grammatical gender while EN/ZH remain neutral; core decision semantics remain equivalent.
issues.remediation_requirement: Align or explicitly document locale-neutral referent conventions in a later remediation step.

issues.description: A known housing horizon, a rate-stability assumption, and a missing maintenance budget do not form an explicit incompatible claim pair; mobility loss is also not stated or entailed.

issues.remediation_requirement: Reclassify as critically incomplete and ask only about broad urgent-warning-sign categories, or add an explicit incompatible claim pair without requesting sensitive detail.

issues.description: Official channels and alert uncertainty support readiness comparison, but the mandated no-action path and conditional recommendation are ambiguous in a low-probability high-harm context and could be interpreted as unsafe inaction.
issues.remediation_requirement: Define the no-action path as monitor-official-information while maintaining baseline readiness, and bound any conditional recommendation to official guidance.

issues.description: The expected unknown nested field is absent from the versioned review source, so provider_schema_invalid depends on an invisible candidate defect.
issues.remediation_requirement: Expose the mutated nested candidate field in the fixture review source or remove the rejection oracle.

issues.description: The invalid strategy category is visible and safely rejected, but recurrent cost, provider outage, contractual resilience, and capacity mechanisms exceed the stated source facts.
issues.remediation_requirement: Keep the visible invalid-category rejection and reduce risk mechanisms to higher fixed cost, external dependency, and unconfirmed demand.

issues.description: No severity_hint field or invalid severity value appears in the versioned review source, so the schema rejection cannot be verified.
issues.remediation_requirement: Expose the invalid severity field in the review source or remove the unsupported rejection oracle.

issues.description: No likelihood_hint field or invalid likelihood value appears in the versioned review source, so the schema rejection cannot be verified.
issues.remediation_requirement: Expose the invalid likelihood field in the review source or remove the unsupported rejection oracle.

issues.description: Assistant-chat language is visibly and correctly rejected, but the remaining recurrent-cost, outage, contractual-resilience, and capacity mechanisms exceed the source.
issues.remediation_requirement: Preserve the safety rejection while grounding the unaffected risk mechanisms directly in stated facts and uncertainty.

issues.description: The unsupported guarantee is visibly and correctly rejected, but the remaining recurrent-cost, outage, contractual-resilience, and capacity mechanisms exceed the source.
issues.remediation_requirement: Preserve the safety rejection while grounding the unaffected risk mechanisms directly in stated facts and uncertainty.

issues.description: The near-limit input is valid, but the accepted output strengthens higher fixed cost and external dependency into recurrent-cost, outage, contractual-resilience, and capacity mechanisms absent from the source.
issues.remediation_requirement: Retain the valid boundary case and use only source-entailed risk mechanisms.
